hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "gh pr (merge|ready)" || exit 0; WT=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -oE "/tmp/spawn-worktrees/[a-zA-Z0-9._/-]+" | head -1); if [ -n "$WT" ] && [ -d "$WT/packages/cli" ]; then ROOT="$WT"; else ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); fi; if [ -z "$ROOT" ] || [ ! -d "$ROOT/packages/cli" ]; then echo "WARNING: Could not find spawn repo for pre-merge checks" >&2; exit 0; fi; cd "$ROOT/packages/cli" || exit 2; echo "Pre-merge gate: running biome check + bun test in $ROOT/packages/cli ..." >&2; bunx @biomejs/biome check src/ 2>&1 || { echo "BLOCKED: biome check failed — fix lint/format issues before merging" >&2; exit 2; }; bun test 2>&1 || { echo "BLOCKED: tests failed — fix failures before merging" >&2; exit 2; }; echo "Pre-merge checks passed" >&2'
